title: Monitoring of compliance
doc_html:
NOTE: This provision of law was included in the Unconstitutional Statutes Biennial Report to the Legislature, dated March 14, 2016.

§1959. Monitoring of compliance

           The division shall independently monitor the participation of enterprises in the contracts let by each state agency and educational institution.

           Acts 1984, No. 653, §1, eff. July 1, 1984; Acts 1987, No. 916, §1; Acts 1988, No. 397, §1; Acts 1992, No. 797, §2, eff. July 1, 1992.

§1959.  Monitoring of compliance
The division shall independently monitor the participation of enterprises
in the contracts let by each state agency and educational institution.
Acts 1984, No. 653, §1, eff. July 1, 1984; Acts 1987, No. 916, §1; Acts
1988, No. 397, §1; Acts 1992, No. 797, §2, eff. July 1, 1992.
